facts.claim: The show is hosted by Ben Gilbert and David Rosenthal.
The show's purpose is to teach listeners the playbooks that built the world’s greatest companies and how to apply them.
The show's core premise or tagline is 'Every company has a story.'
The show was active from 2015 to 2026.
The show has a 'Clean' content rating.
The show is copyrighted by ACQ, LLC in 2025.
